title: Review Run Manifest
description: Provenance and configuration for a Working Paper Review Engine run.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this review run.

document_id.description: Identifier of the working paper under review.

source_document_uri.description: Location of the PDF or source document.

generated_at.description: Timestamp when the run was produced (ISO 8601).

personas_applied.description: Persona identifiers used during the run.

rubric_version.description: Optional version tag for the review rubric.

model_version.description: Optional model or ensemble version used for generation.

schema_versions.description: Mapping of schema names to versions used during the run.
